title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates:
Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates!
